name: Lume
summary: Glanceable RSVP reading on Rokid AR glasses with phone library for PDFs, TXT, and shared text
description: Lume enables speed reading on Rokid AR glasses using RSVP, streaming text from your phone. Import PDFs, TXT files, or share text from any Android app to read one word at a time with adjustable speed and progress sync.
author: beyondlevi

releases.notes:
Initial public release of Lume.

- RSVP reader for Rokid glasses with adaptive pacing, 150-700 wpm controls, pause context, sentence navigation, and synced progress.
- Phone library for PDF and TXT import, pasted text, and document removal with on-device text extraction.
- Android share target for text, PDF, and TXT files.
- Hybrid CXR-L, BLE GATT, and Bluetooth SPP transport with versioned handshake and word-window streaming.
- English and Portuguese UI, selected on the phone and synced to the glasses.
changes: Adds an RSVP reader with adaptive pacing, 150-700 wpm controls, pause context, sentence navigation, and synced progress.
Adds a phone library for PDF and TXT import, pasted text, and document removal with on-device text extraction.
Adds an Android share target for text, PDF, and TXT files.
Adds hybrid CXR-L, BLE GATT, and Bluetooth SPP transport with a versioned handshake and word-window streaming.
Adds English and Portuguese UI, selected on the phone and synced to the glasses.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
# About Lume
Lume turns Rokid AR glasses into a wearable speed reader using RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation). It streams text one word at a time from your phone over Bluetooth, highlighting the optimal recognition point for easy reading.

# Key Features
- **RSVP Display:** One word at a time with focal letter highlight to minimize eye movement.
- **Adaptive Pacing:** Longer display for long words and sentence breaks.
- **Speed Control:** Adjustable from 150 to 700 wpm via swipe gestures.
- **Pause with Context:** Shows surrounding sentence when paused.
- **Sentence Navigation:** Swipe to jump between sentences while paused.
- **Progress Sync:** Reading position saved and synced between glasses and phone.
- **Library Management:** Import PDFs and TXT files, paste text, or share from any Android app.
- **Hybrid Bluetooth Transport:** Uses multiple Bluetooth protocols for reliable connection.

# How It Works
Lume consists of two apps:
- **Phone app:** Hosts your reading library, extracts text on-device, and streams words to the glasses.
- **Glasses app:** Displays the RSVP reader HUD and handles reading controls.

# Controls (Glasses Touchpad)
- Tap: Pause/Resume
- Swipe Up/Down: Increase/Decrease speed or navigate sentences when paused
- Double Tap: Return to library

# Requirements
- Rokid AR glasses paired with an Android phone running the Lume phone app.
- Bluetooth permissions granted on the phone.

Lume provides a practical, glanceable reading experience optimized for Rokid AR glasses.
